title: undertow's Apocalypse HUD
description: A small resource pack that gives the Minecraft hotbar and HUD a rusted feel.
body:
This small resource pack switches Minecraft's normal HUD and hotbar for one with a more 'apocalyptic' feel. 

While making this pack, heavy inspiration was taken from this resource pack on Planet Minecraft: [Kyff's Apocalypse Hotbar](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/kyff-s-apocalypse-hotbar)!

Screenshots were taken with [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) while playing on the [OWZA](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/open-world-zombie-apocalypse-survival/) map!

This resource pack was tested in 1.8.9 and 1.18.2, and should work in all versions 1.8.9-1.20.1 inclusive. It does not work in 1.20.2.
